scripts.pack: npm run package:tasks && tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json --overrides-file config/release.json
scripts.packupversion: npm run package:tasks && tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json --rev-version --overrides-file config/release.json
scripts.pack:dev: npm run package:tasks && tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json --overrides-file config/dev.json
scripts.packupversion:dev: npm run package:tasks && tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json --rev-version --overrides-file config/dev.json
